title: fragaria vulgaris var. monophylla
intro: Fragaria vulgaris var. monophylla, also known as the single-leaf strawberry or wild strawberry, is a rare variety of strawberry plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its high content of salicylic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fragaria vulgaris var. monophylla include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Fragaria vulgaris var. monophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
